queries.question: What environment is common to all sound mixers?
queries.sql: SELECT Recording_Environments.environment_name  from Sound_Mixer_Environment_History join Recording_Environments on Sound_Mixer_Environment_History.environment_id = Recording_Environments.id join Post_Production_Sound_Mixers on Sound_Mixer_Environment_History.sound_mixer_id = Post_Production_Sound_Mixers.id   GROUP BY Sound_Mixer_Environment_History.environment_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Sound_Mixer_Environment_History.sound_mixer_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Post_Production_Sound_Mixers)

queries.question: For each sound mixer, list the environments they record in.
queries.sql: select post_production_sound_mixers.name , recording_environments.environment_name from Sound_Mixer_Environment_History join Recording_Environments on Sound_Mixer_Environment_History.environment_id = Recording_Environments.id join Post_Production_Sound_Mixers on Sound_Mixer_Environment_History.sound_mixer_id = Post_Production_Sound_Mixers.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?environment_name WHERE {
  ?sound_mixer_environment_history a :Sound_Mixer_Environment_History .
  ?recording_environments a :Recording_Environments .
  ?sound_mixer_environment_history p:hasRecording_Environments ?recording_environments .
  ?post_production_sound_mixers a :Post_Production_Sound_Mixers .
  ?sound_mixer_environment_history p:hasPost_Production_Sound_Mixers ?post_production_sound_mixers .
  ?post_production_sound_mixers p:name ?name .
  ?recording_environments p:environment_name ?environment_name .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the environment every sound mixer records in.
